Implement a Go package hexcolor with Parse(s string) (r, g, b uint8, err error) that parses CSS-style '#RGB' and '#RRGGBB' hex colors (case-insensitive), expanding #abc to #aabbcc. Any other input (missing #, wrong length, non-hex digits, empty) must return an error wrapping a sentinel ErrInvalid. Include table-driven tests covering valid 3- and 6-digit forms, case-insensitivity, and each invalid class.
